data.content: Confirmed during planning that Loom already has per-action output declarations in `loom/knots_sdlc/workflow.loom` and per-profile per-action PR overrides in both PR profiles, including the previously missed `loom/knots_sdlc/profiles/autopilot_with_pr_no_planning.loom`. The planned implementation is to introduce canonical per-step expected-output metadata in the Loom/bundle/runtime model, replace builtin global output flattening in `src/profiles.toml` / `src/profile_normalize.rs`, and move claim/skill prompt rendering onto runtime-resolved step metadata instead of pre-rendered profile-wide output mode. Test coverage should span parser/validation, builtin normalization, step-metadata resolution, and Loom compatibility prompt rendering; no separate browser-only prompt path surfaced in this scan.
